Name: insert_postgis_locations_one
SQL: WITH check_mutation_result AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $1::text AS "name", ST_GeomFromGeoJSON($2) AS "geom", ST_GeomFromGeoJSON($3)::geography AS "geog", ST_GeomFromGeoJSON($4) AS "area", ST_GeomFromGeoJSON($5) AS "nullable_geom") AS data WHERE true), mutation_result AS (INSERT INTO "public"."postgis_locations" ("name", "geom", "geog", "area", "nullable_geom") SELECT check_mutation_result."name", check_mutation_result."geom", check_mutation_result."geog", check_mutation_result."area", check_mutation_result."nullable_geom" FROM check_mutation_result RETURNING *) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT mutation_result."name" AS "name", ST_AsGeoJSON(mutation_result."geom", 15, 4)::jsonb AS "geom", ST_AsGeoJSON(mutation_result."geog", 15, 4)::jsonb AS "geog", ST_AsGeoJSON(mutation_result."nullable_geom", 15, 4)::jsonb AS "nullable_geom") AS "_e")) FROM mutation_result
